subject: Scent-Ghoul, a spectral humanoid figure with glasses depicted in a ghostly translucent style against a blue-teal ethereal background
description: A close-up portrait of a spectral humanoid figure rendered in cool blue and teal tones with a translucent, ghostly quality. The figure wears glasses and has a downturned, sullen expression visible through the ethereal treatment. The overall rendering style blurs and dissolves the edges of the figure into the background, suggesting a spirit or ghost form. The flavor text on the card reads 'You're playing the loser role in youth just like me, aren't you?' — visible in the card frame but used only for mood context: the art communicates melancholy and social resentment. Deep blues, teals, and blacks dominate the palette.
foreground: spectral humanoid figure with glasses, translucent ghost-form
background: ethereal blue-teal void with dissolving edges
emotion: sullen, melancholic, downward gaze suggesting resentment or social isolation
